unity_3d.Description: Main game engine for gameplay programming, UI, scene management, optimization, and editor tooling across mobile and WebGL projects.

csharp.Description: Primary language for gameplay systems, tools, data handling, and Unity scripting with a focus on clean, maintainable code.

photon.Description: Used Photon Fusion and PUN2 for multiplayer gameplay, network synchronization, room flow, and lobby systems.

firebase.Description: Used for authentication, player data, analytics, and live-game backend support across Unity projects.

google_cloud.Description: Supported server-side features, API integration, and live game infrastructure using Google Cloud services.

git.Description: Used for version control, collaboration, branching workflows, and keeping projects organized across teams.

cicd.Description: Built and maintained automated build pipelines for Unity projects, including branch selection, upload steps, and notifications.

rest_apis.Description: Used for client-server communication, data exchange, and integrating gameplay systems with external services.
